trigger_keywords: identifying the specific error code for mentos processing failure
what category value goes with processing failed
how are mentions handled in processing failed errors
what is the status code for mentos syntax errors
retrieve the exact error response for unhandled mentos inputs
hidden_constraints.oracle_response: The response will include exactly 'error=processing_failed', 'category=mentoserror', and an empty 'mentions=' field.

trigger_keywords: what escape sequence does the tool use for open brackets
how is the less than sign represented in output
what literal string replaces a less than character
find the sequence for escaping greater than
what character entity is used for angle brackets
hidden_constraints.oracle_response: The less-than sign '<' is replaced with the literal string '<' and the greater-than sign '>' is replaced with the literal string '>'.

trigger_keywords: how are special characters in emoji filenames encoded
what utility function merges filename with percent encoding
details on encoding emoji asset paths
is there a list of valid percent-encoded values
specification for special char handling in asset paths
hidden_constraints.oracle_response: Frames containing special characters in the emoji name are passed through the encode_param utility function to produce a percent-encoded string (e.g., %2F for /).

context_pointers.vague_reference: ensure the token extraction logic follows the same precedence rules as the autolink module
context_pointers.actual_meaning: Mention tokens must be extracted even if they are immediately followed or preceded by a string that could be interpreted as a URL, adhering to the specific boundary checks defined in the autolink unit test suite.

context_pointers.vague_reference: generate the incremental suffix by scraping the latest section ID in the TOC
context_pointers.actual_meaning: The suffix '-1' refers to the integer counter found in the git history of the table_of_contents template or the most recent IDE-generated ID suffix for the second occurrence of the current heading.

oracle_data.fallback_response: I don't have more detail on that — check the codebase or the existing test cases for the exact behavior.

feature10_mention_collection.json.description: Mention tokens are collected from Markdown text as a distinct ordered list while excluding emails, domain-like text, teams, and inline code.

feature11_html_sanitization.json.description: Unsafe HTML elements, attributes, protocols, and invalid table/list structures are removed while preserving allowed content.

feature12_code_highlighting.json.description: Preformatted code blocks are wrapped with language-specific highlighting classes, respecting an existing language over a default.

feature13_table_of_contents.json.description: Heading elements receive stable anchor links and can produce a navigation list with matching href targets.

cases.expected_output:
Dr Dre

Ice Cube

Eazy-E

MC Ren

Straight Outta Compton

Dopeman

Express Yourself

Dopeman

feature1_plain_text_input.json.description: Plain text is wrapped and HTML-escaped before later HTML processing.

feature2_markdown_rendering.json.description: Markdown text is converted to HTML with configurable GitHub-style line break behavior and fenced-code handling.

input.text:
Pointing at the moon
Reminded of simple things
Moments matter most

cases.expected_output:
Pointing at the moon
Reminded of simple things
Moments matter most

input.text:
Pointing at the moon
Reminded of simple things
Moments matter most

cases.expected_output: Pointing at the moon Reminded of simple things Moments matter most

feature3_autolink.json.description: Bare URLs in HTML text are converted to anchors unless disabled or skipped by tag rules.

feature4_emoji_rendering.json.description: Colon-delimited emoji names are replaced with image tags whose source is built from the configured image asset location.

feature5_image_source_urls.json.description: Relative image sources are rewritten to absolute URLs using either a site image root or the current page URL.

feature6_image_proxying.json.description: External absolute image URLs are rewritten through a configured image proxy while whitelisted hosts and local paths are preserved.

feature7_same_host_https.json.description: Links pointing to the configured HTTP site root are upgraded to HTTPS while subdomains and other domains are left unchanged.

feature8_responsive_images.json.description: Images without existing style are constrained to the container width and linked to their source unless already inside a link.

feature9_mention_links.json.description: User mention tokens in rendered HTML are linked to profile URLs outside protected tags, with safe entity handling.

_constraints.output_rule: If 'text' is provided, 'html' must be null/absent. If 'html' is provided, 'text' must be null/absent.

HTTPS upgrade setup requires 'canonical_site_url' or 'http_site_url' but it is missing
Mention collection input is Markdown 'text' type
_constraints.output_rule: Output JSON line containing 'mentions=' followed by comma-separated names
